Aunt Dorothys Meat Balls

author: Beth Germick

Prep time ->

Cook time -> 20 min

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 2 lbs hamburger
  • 2 pkg onion soup
  • 1 can evap. milk
  • 1 tbs. worcestershire sauce
  • 8 drops tabasco
  • 2 eggs

sauce: 1 c. brown sugar 2 c. ketchup

Directions

  1. Mix all ingredients except sauce.
  2. Roll into 1 in balls.
  3. Bake on foil lined cookie sheet at 350 for 1/2 hour or until cooked through.
  4. Combine sauce ingredients and pour over meatballs.
  5. Simmer 20 minutes.
